meta.source_note: Disusun dari informasi yang sudah diberikan pengguna dalam percakapan.

portfolio.concept: Interactive pixel-game portfolio with exploration and object/NPC interaction.
portfolio.gameplay_summary: Player explores Alfarizi Plaza, talks to NPCs, reads objects, and opens modal panels for portfolio sections.
portfolio.visual_style: Retro pixel art inspired by old handheld RPG games.

summary: Undergraduate Informatics student with strong interest in mobile development, software engineering, and interactive web portfolio experiences. Focused on building user-friendly, structured, and scalable applications.

thesis.title: Rancang Bangun Sistem Optimasi Kinerja Data Definition Language (DDL) MySQL Berbasis API Gemini
thesis.focus: A web-based system that helps analyze MySQL DDL, generate structured optimization suggestions, support review and finalization, and validate the resulting SQL through a Docker Sandbox workflow.
thesis.scope_note: The system optimizes DDL structure and review workflow; it does not claim direct production runtime performance improvement.
